description: Block git force push commands using the if condition for efficient filtering. Prevents accidental force pushes that can overwrite remote history. Covers --force, --force-with-lease, and the -f shorthand.

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Force push is blocked by hook"}}'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Force push (-f) is blocked by hook"}}'
